_metadata.purpose: Block sign-ins flagged as high-risk by Entra Identity Protection (impossible travel, anonymous IP, leaked credentials, malware-linked IP, etc).
deployment_notes: Requires Entra ID P2 licensing or Microsoft 365 E5 (Identity Protection feature).
If on lower license tier, this policy will not have access to sign-in risk evaluation — defer until license upgrade.
Alternative for orgs without P2: use 'Require MFA' grantControl instead of block. MFA still meaningfully reduces risk for medium-risk sign-ins.
